experiment.description: Saved adjudicator-only rerun with Flash Attention and q8_0 KV cache

resolved_extraction.title: Population pharmacokinetics of Testdrug

structural_model.description: two-compartment oral model with first-order absorption

evidence_quotes: A nonlinear mixed-effects model was fitted with NONMEM FOCEI.
A two-compartment oral model with first-order absorption was selected.

decisions.evidence: The text does not specify the population (e.g., 'general', 'pediatric'). Vision Lane correctly left this as null.
decisions.rationale: Text Lane hallucinated 'general'. Vision Lane is correct.

decisions.source_locator: Methods: A nonlinear mixed-effects model was fitted with NONMEM FOCEI.
decisions.evidence: The software is NONMEM. FOCEI is the estimation method.
decisions.rationale: Text Lane correctly separated software (NONMEM) from estimation method (FOCEI). Vision Lane conflated them.

decisions.source_locator: A two-compartment oral model with first-order absorption was selected.
decisions.evidence: The text explicitly defines the structural model type. 'Nonlinear mixed-effects' is the statistical framework, not the specific PK model structure.
decisions.rationale: Text Lane provided the specific structural description found in the evidence.

decisions.source_locator: A two-compartment oral model with first-order absorption was selected.
decisions.evidence: In NONMEM, ADVAN=2 is for IV bolus. ADVAN=24 is for Oral administration (first-order). The text specifies 'oral'.
decisions.rationale: Vision Lane correctly identified the code corresponding to an oral model.

decisions.resolved_value: two-compartment oral model with first-order absorption
decisions.source_locator: A two-compartment oral model with first-order absorption was selected.
decisions.rationale: Vision Lane provided the exact description found in the evidence.

decisions.evidence: The text specifies the exact mathematical relationship for the covariate effect.
decisions.rationale: Text Lane provided the specific formula. Vision Lane was too vague ('body weight').

decisions.resolved_value: [{"description": "interindividual variance on CL", "value": 0.09}, {"description": "interindividual variance on V1", "value": 0.16}]
decisions.evidence: The values are identical in both lanes, but Vision Lane's formatting is cleaner.
decisions.rationale: Both correct, Vision Lane selected for consistency.

decisions.evidence: The values are identical in both lanes.
decisions.rationale: Both correct, Vision Lane selected for consistency.

result.summary: Vision Lane correctly identified the structural model code (ADVAN=24) and avoided hallucinating a population type. Text Lane provided superior detail on the covariate formula and correctly separated software from estimation method. The resolved extraction combines these strengths.
